name_en: Church of Santa Maria do Castelo
name_local: Church of Santa Maria do Castelo

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the 18th century azulejos are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os azulejos do século XVIII?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh DOO SEH-koo-loo dih-ZAWEE-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Baroque ceramic tiles depicting religious scenes.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan or the local volunteer guide.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan or the local volunteer guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário local.

phrases.text_local: Pode recomendar um restaurante típico perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia voluntário local, ele poderá recomendar restaurantes típicos nas proximidades.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL, EH-lih poh-deh-RAH reh-koo-mayng-DAHR rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh NUHSH proo-see-mee-DAH-dihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the local volunteer guide, they can recommend typical restaurants nearby.

responses.english: Ask the local volunteer guide, they can recommend typical restaurants nearby.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL, EH-lih poh-deh-RAH reh-koo-mayng-DAHR rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh NUHSH proo-see-mee-DAH-dihsh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guia voluntário local, ele poderá recomendar restaurantes típicos nas proximidades.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where D. Paio Peres Correia tomb is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o túmulo de D. Paio Peres Correia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW TOON-moo-loo DIH DEH. PEYEOO PEH-rihsh koo-RAYUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Medieval knight commemorated with a carved sarcophagus.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan or the local volunteer guide.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan or the local volunteer guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a capela-mor do templo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH kuh-PEH-luh-MAWR DOO TAYMP-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Altar area housing the primary liturgical focus.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no fundo da nave, ao centro.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO FOONNG-doo DUH NAH-vih, OW SAYNGT-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the nave end, in the center.

responses.english: Good morning, at the nave end, in the center.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO FOONNG-doo DUH NAH-vih, OW SAYNGT-roo.
responses.local: Bom dia, no fundo da nave, ao centro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the upper choir is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o coro alto da igreja?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KOH-roo AHL-too DUH eeg-REH-zhuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Elevated wooden gallery for liturgical singing.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan or the volunteer guide.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan or the volunteer guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Coro Alto is
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica o Coro Alto?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KOH-roo AHL-too?
phrases.cultural_note: The Coro Alto, or high choir, is an elevated area often reserved for liturgical music; it’s a key architectural feature in Portuguese churches.

likely_response.local: No fundo da nave, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO FOONNG-doo DUH NAH-vih, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the nave, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the nave, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NOO FOONNG-doo DUH NAH-vih, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: No fundo da nave, à direita.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Manueline portal is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o portal manuelino da igreja?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW poo-ruh-TAHL muh-nooih-LEE-noo DUH eeg-REH-zhuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Late Gothic stonework framing the main access.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan or the local volunteer guide.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan or the local volunteer guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo loo-KAHL.
responses.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the 18th century azulejos are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os azulejos do século XVIII?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh DOO SEH-koo-loo dih-ZAWEE-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Azulejos are traditional Portuguese ceramic tiles. The 18th-century panels often depict biblical scenes and are a highlight of the church interior.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the main chapel.

responses.english: Good morning, in the main chapel.
